Practice-Based Patients.quote: "My psoriasis has visibly improved. ZORYVE is easy_x000D_to use and helped with the itching and flaking."

Practice-Based Patients.referenceId: DOF Authentic Voices Photos and Survey Results
Practice-Based Patients.quote: "My experience has been wonderful! ZORYVE is_x000D_quick and easy to apply and dries very quickly, too."

Practice-Based Patients.referenceId: DOF Authentic Voices Photos and Survey Results
Practice-Based Patients.quote: "I have found this medication to be very easy to use_x000D_and it was extremely effective for me. The cream is_x000D_not greasy, absorbs quickly, and does not impact my_x000D_daily routine at all. My psoriasis cleared up much_x000D_more quickly than I expected."

Practice-Based Patients.referenceId: DOF Authentic Voices Photos and Survey Results
Practice-Based Patients.treatmentsTriedAndFailed: Hydrocortisone 1% and 2.5% cream, OTC moisturisers, and triamcinolone 0.1%
Practice-Based Patients.quote: "I would advise another patient to try ZORYVE_x000D_because it isn’t a steroid and is a gentle treatment that_x000D_can be directly applied to any area of skin."

Practice-Based Patients.referenceId: DOF Authentic Voices Photos and Survey Results
Practice-Based Patients.quote: "ZORYVE was easy to use and was highly effective. I saw clearance after a few days of use and have been able to maintain it using ZORYVE as spot treatment."

Practice-Based Patients.quote: "My itch decreased significantly and my skin healed_x000D_quickly. I’d recommend ZORYVE to another patient._x000D_It’s more convenient than using topical steroids."

Practice-Based Patients.quote: "ZORYVE was very easy to use. I liked the texture,_x000D_and it worked well to prevent itching."
